<!-- What did you add or change? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Add new tool
- [ ] Update existing tool
- [ ] Fix data quality issue
- [ ] Docs / workflow update

## New Tool Details (Required for "Add new tool")

- Tool Name:
- Tool ID (kebab-case):
- Category:
- Pricing Model (Free/Freemium/Paid/Subscription):
- Official Website:

## Tool Entry JSON (Required for "Add new tool")

<!-- Paste the exact JSON entry you added -->

```json
{
  "id": "tool-name-kebab-case",
  "name": "Tool Display Name",
  "description": "Brief and factual description of what the tool does.",
  "category": "development",
  "pricing": "Freemium",
  "link": "https://official-site.com",
  "tags": ["tag-1", "tag-2"],
  "featured": false,
  "popular": false,
  "new": true,
  "rating": 0,
  "submittedBy": "your-github-username",
  "submittedAt": "2026-04-09T00:00:00Z",
  "lastUpdated": "2026-04-09T00:00:00Z",
  "verificationStatus": "pending"
}
```

## Submission Checklist

- [ ] I confirmed the tool is not already listed.
- [ ] I added/updated the correct category file in `data/tools/`.
- [ ] Tool ID is lowercase kebab-case and unique.
- [ ] All required fields are present and valid.
- [ ] Link is official and accessible.
- [ ] I ran `npm run validate` successfully.
- [ ] I ran `npm run test` successfully.
- [ ] I ran `npm run format` to keep generated files in sync.

## Optional Context

- Why this tool should be included:
- Alternatives considered:
- Additional notes:
